title: [ImportVerilog] Fix capture callback chaining
body:
This commit fixes the chaining sequence of capture callbacks. Previously, parent callbacks would be run before the callbacks of the inner scope; this could lead to the callback of the inner scope rejecting a capture but the outer scope accepting it. This commit first checks whether the inner scope accepts the capture before also running the outer scope's callback.

This commit further rejects non-reference captures (these should not happen on reads/writes anyway).
Fixes [#9164](https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/9164)
